name: analitiq-claude-code-plugins
description: Analitiq Claude Code plugins for building data integration components against the published Analitiq schema contract (schemas.analitiq.ai)

plugins.name: analitiq-connector-builder
plugins.description: Creates connectors and endpoints for the Analitiq DIP registry with support for API, database, and storage integrations

plugins.name: analitiq-pipeline-builder
plugins.description: Authors pipeline, stream, connection, and database-endpoint documents, wiring connectors from the DIP registry into complete pipelines
